name: Meat Loaf for 120
recipeInstructions:
"A friend of mine gave me this recipe, which was a favorite at 4-H camp." - Joanne Shew
Combine beef, eggs, oats, tomato juice, onions, salt and pepper. Form into 16 loaves. Place in 9x5x3 inches loaf pans.
Combine sauce ingredients; pour 3 tbsp over each loaf. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 1/2 to 2 hours or until no pink remains, basting once with remaining sauce.
